name: Quick 'n Easy Macaroni & Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time has been shortened.
2. Cook macaroni until al dente. Drain well.
3. Combine 1 1/2 cups Cheddar cheese and remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
4. Stir in the macaroni.
5. Mix well.
6. Turn into a greased 9-inch x 9-inch baking pan.
7. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 30 minutes or until hot.
9. Broil lightly, if desired, for a crisp golden brown top.
